title: Export to Excel and deactivated users
excerpt: If I deactivate a user, it will not be reflected on my Excel export. His pulses will exported without his name in person’s columns.

posts.author: r.quinzio (Renato Quinzio)
posts.cookedHtml: If I deactivate a user, it will not be reflected on my Excel export. His pulses will exported without his name in person’s columns.
